CVE-2022-40899.title: An issue discovered in Python Charmers Future 0.18.2 and earlier  ...
CVE-2022-40899.summary: An issue discovered in Python Charmers Future 0.18.2 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service via crafted Set-Cookie header from malicious web server.
